items.title: Fire-Resistant Racing Suit
items.description: Full-body fire-resistant racing suit required

items.title: Racing Helmet
items.description: Must cover the whole face

items.title: Racing Gloves
items.description: Must be closed-finger and long enough to cover the wrist (Minimum)

items.title: Racing Shoes
items.description: Must be closed-toe and long enough to cover the ankle (Minimum) (fire-resistant)

items.title: Safety Switch
items.description: Working safety switch required

items.title: Roll Cage (or) Full Mirror Sticker
items.description: Certified roll cage or full mirror sticker

items.title: Hood Pin Lock
items.description: Hood pin lock installed

items.title: Full Bucket Seat
items.description: Full bucket racing seat properly mounted

items.title: 4 Point Racing Seat Belt
items.description: 4-point or higher racing seat belt

items.title: Battery Terminal Covers
items.description: Battery terminals must be covered

items.title: Fire Extinguisher
items.description: Working fire extinguisher mounted and accessible

items.title: Tow Front and Rear
items.description: Tow hooks installed front and rear

items.title: Liability Waiver
items.description: I acknowledge and accept full liability for any injuries or damages

items.title: Event Rules and Regulations
items.description: I agree to follow all event rules and regulations

items.title: Safety Briefing Attendance Requirement
items.description: I will attend the mandatory safety briefing before the event

items.title: Vehicle Inspection Agreement
items.description: I agree to have my vehicle inspected before participating

items.title: Media Release
items.description: I consent to photos and videos being taken and used for promotional purposes

items.title: Cancellation and Refund Policy
items.description: I understand and accept the cancellation and refund policy

items.title: Code of Conduct
items.description: I agree to maintain professional conduct and sportsmanship

items.title: Assumption of Risk
items.description: I understand motor sports involve inherent risks and participate at my own risk
